name: FormBuilder.FieldBuilder.Autocomplete

aliases.name: AutocompleteAttributes
aliases.type: { labels : Maybe (element -> String), hoverStyle : List (Style -> Style) }

values.name: autocompleteState
values.type: (Msg (List element) -> msg) -> (element -> msg) -> List ( String, Decoder (List element) ) -> State element msg

values.name: get
values.type: String -> Decoder element -> ( String, Decoder element )

values.name: input
values.type: State element msg -> (element -> Html msg) -> List (AttributesModifier (AutocompleteAttributes element) msg) -> Html msg

values.name: maxResults
values.type: Int -> State element msg -> State element msg

values.name: minChars
values.comment:
Set the minimum number of character before launch of requests.
It can't be less than 1.
values.type: Int -> State element msg -> State element msg

values.name: subscriptions
values.type: State element msg -> Float -> Sub msg

values.name: update
values.type: Msg (List element) -> State element msg -> ( State element msg, Cmd msg )

values.name: withHover
values.type: List (Style -> Style) -> FieldAttributes (AutocompleteAttributes element) msg -> FieldAttributes (AutocompleteAttributes element) msg

values.name: withLabels
values.type: (element -> String) -> FieldAttributes (AutocompleteAttributes element) msg -> FieldAttributes (AutocompleteAttributes element) msg
